privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for qground_control_env ag_sprayer_system_config task by verifying that the integration manual is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh. The expected target parameters (SPRAY_ENABLE: 1, SERVO9_FUNCTION: 22, SERVO10_FUNCTION: 23, SPRAY_SPEED_MIN: 250, SPRAY_PUMP_MIN: 15, SPRAY_PUMP_RATE: 80) explicitly match the task description instructions, setup scripts, and verifier logic. These values map correctly to real ArduPilot parameter constants.
